ciphertext.notes: ERROR FOUND: The 147 listing has wrong frequency counts for G=27 (real) vs 28 (wrong), Q=20 (real) vs 19 (wrong).  I eyeballed it and the 147 count is wrong.  I assume the ciphertext was incorrectly typed when input to STETHOSCOPE.
